# Base Business Document Import

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:ffcc6d9c87232b27f20ec4e103c2e90498aa11044eb2b6fdbbeabcf9cab3f7a4
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This is a technical module ; it doesn't bring any useful feature by itself. This module is the base modules for 2 other modules :

- *account_invoice_import* which imports supplier invoices as PDF or XML files (this module also requires some additional modules such as *account_invoice_import_invoice2data*, *account_invoice_import_ubl*, etc... to support specific invoice formats),
- *sale_invoice_import* which imports sale orders as CSV, XML or PDF files (this module also requires some additional modules such as *sale_invoice_import_csv* or *sale_invoice_import_ubl* to support specific order formats)

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_business_document_import.models.business_document_import.BusinessDocumentImport.user_error_wrap
documentation:
The method and data_dict arguments are useful when you want to
inherit this method to update the error message

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_business_document_import.models.business_document_import.BusinessDocumentImport._get_country_filter
documentation: Generate filter by country

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_business_document_import.models.business_document_import.BusinessDocumentImport._match_partner_ref
documentation: If a ref is explicitly given, we just want to match that partner

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_business_document_import.models.business_document_import.BusinessDocumentImport._match_partner
documentation:
Example:
partner_dict = {
    'country_code': 'FR',
    'state_code': False,
    'vat': 'FR12448890432',
    'email': 'roger.lemaire@akretion.com',
    'website': 'www.akretion.com',
    'name': 'Akretion France',
    'ref': 'C1242',
    'phone': '01.41.98.12.42',
    }

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_business_document_import.models.business_document_import.BusinessDocumentImport._match_shipping_partner
documentation:
Example:
shipping_dict = {
    'email': 'contact@akretion.com',
    'name': 'Akretion France',
    'street': 'Long Avenue',
    'street2': 'Building 2A',
    'city': 'Paris',
    'zip': '69100',
    'country_code': 'FR',
    }
The shipping partner can be any partner, not especially related to the
customer/supplier (partner argument)

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_business_document_import.models.business_document_import.BusinessDocumentImport._match_product
documentation:
Retrieve product.

Matching sequence:

1. ID
2. barcode
3. packaging barcode
4. default_code
5. seller code

```
param product_dict

dictionary w/ product info.

Example: {'barcode': '5449000054227', 'code': 'COCA1L'}

param chatter_msg

list of msgs to append to chatter (if any)

param seller

optional product.supplierinfo record
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_business_document_import.models.business_document_import.BusinessDocumentImport._match_currency
documentation:
Example:
currency_dict = {
    'iso': 'USD',  # If we have ISO, no need to have more keys
    'symbol': '$',
    'country_code': 'US',
    'iso_or_symbol': '$',
    }

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_business_document_import.models.business_document_import.BusinessDocumentImport._match_uom
odoo.addons.base_business_document_import.models.business_document_import.BusinessDocumentImport._match_taxes
documentation: taxes_list must be a list of tax_dict

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_business_document_import.models.business_document_import.BusinessDocumentImport._match_tax
documentation:
Example:
tax_dict = {
    'amount_type': 'percent',  # required param, 'fixed' or 'percent'
    'amount': 20.0,  # required
    'unece_type_code': 'VAT',
    'unece_categ_code': 'S',
    'unece_due_date_code': '72',
    }
